lines.english: Lesson 3
lines.chinese: 第3课
lines.raw: Lesson 3 | 第3课

lines.english: Matterhorn man
lines.chinese: 马特洪峰人
lines.raw: Matterhorn man | 马特洪峰人

lines.english: What was the main objective of early mountain climbers?
lines.chinese: 早期登山者的主要目标是什么？
lines.raw: What was the main objective of early mountain climbers? | 早期登山者的主要目标是什么？

lines.english: Modern alpinists try to climb mountains by a route which will give them good sport,
lines.chinese: 现代登山者尝试通过一条能给他们带来良好体验的路线攀登山脉，
lines.raw: Modern alpinists try to climb mountains by a route which will give them good sport, | 现代登山者尝试通过一条能给他们带来良好体验的路线攀登山脉，

lines.english: and the more difficult it is, the more highly it is regarded.
lines.chinese: 越是困难，就越受推崇。
lines.raw: and the more difficult it is, the more highly it is regarded. | 越是困难，就越受推崇。

lines.english: In the pioneering days however, this was not the case at all.
lines.chinese: 然而，在开创时期，情况并非如此。
lines.raw: In the pioneering days however, this was not the case at all. | 然而，在开创时期，情况并非如此。

lines.english: The early climbers were looking for the easiest way to the top because the summit was the prize they sought,
lines.chinese: 早期登山者寻找最容易登顶的路线，因为山顶是他们追求的奖品，
lines.raw: The early climbers were looking for the easiest way to the top because the summit was the prize they sought, | 早期登山者寻找最容易登顶的路线，因为山顶是他们追求的奖品，

lines.english: especially if it had never been attained before.
lines.chinese: 尤其是在从未有人登顶过的情况下。
lines.raw: especially if it had never been attained before. | 尤其是在从未有人登顶过的情况下。

lines.english: It is true that during their explorations they often faced difficulties and dangers of the most perilous nature,
lines.chinese: 诚然，在他们的探险过程中，他们经常面临最危险性质的困难和危险，
lines.raw: It is true that during their explorations they often faced difficulties and dangers of the most perilous nature, | 诚然，在他们的探险过程中，他们经常面临最危险性质的困难和危险，

lines.english: equipped in a manner which would make a modern climber shudder at the thought,
lines.chinese: 他们所装备的方式会让现代登山者不寒而栗，
lines.raw: equipped in a manner which would make a modern climber shudder at the thought, | 他们所装备的方式会让现代登山者不寒而栗，

lines.english: but they did not go out of their way to court such excitement.
lines.chinese: 但他们并没有刻意追求这种刺激。
lines.raw: but they did not go out of their way to court such excitement. | 但他们并没有刻意追求这种刺激。

lines.english: They had a single aim, a solitary goal -- the top!
lines.chinese: 他们只有一个目的，一个唯一的目标——顶峰！
lines.raw: They had a single aim, a solitary goal -- the top! | 他们只有一个目的，一个唯一的目标——顶峰！

lines.english: It is hard for us to realize nowadays how difficult it was for the pioneers.
lines.chinese: 如今我们很难体会到先驱们当时所面临的困难。
lines.raw: It is hard for us to realize nowadays how difficult it was for the pioneers. | 如今我们很难体会到先驱们当时所面临的困难。

lines.english: Except for one or two places such as Zermatt and Chamonix, which had rapidly become popular.
lines.chinese: 除了采尔马特和霞慕尼等一两个迅速变得受欢迎的地方，
lines.raw: Except for one or two places such as Zermatt and Chamonix, which had rapidly become popular. | 除了采尔马特和霞慕尼等一两个迅速变得受欢迎的地方，

lines.english: Alpine villages tended to be impoverished settlements cut off from civilization by the high mountains.
lines.chinese: 高山村庄往往是贫困的定居点，被高山与文明隔绝。
lines.raw: Alpine villages tended to be impoverished settlements cut off from civilization by the high mountains. | 高山村庄往往是贫困的定居点，被高山与文明隔绝。

lines.english: Such inns as there were were generally dirty and flea-ridden;
lines.chinese: 那些仅有的旅馆通常肮脏且跳蚤遍布；
lines.raw: Such inns as there were were generally dirty and flea-ridden; | 那些仅有的旅馆通常肮脏且跳蚤遍布；

lines.english: the food simply local cheese accompanied by bread often twelve months old,
lines.chinese: 食物只是当地的奶酪，配上通常存放了十二个月的面包，
lines.raw: the food simply local cheese accompanied by bread often twelve months old, | 食物只是当地的奶酪，配上通常存放了十二个月的面包，

lines.english: all washed down with coarse wine.
lines.chinese: 所有这些都用粗劣的葡萄酒冲下。
lines.raw: all washed down with coarse wine. | 所有这些都用粗劣的葡萄酒冲下。

lines.english: Often a valley boasted no inn at all, and climbers found shelter wherever they could --
lines.chinese: 通常一个山谷根本没有旅馆，登山者只好尽其所能寻找住处——
lines.raw: Often a valley boasted no inn at all, and climbers found shelter wherever they could -- | 通常一个山谷根本没有旅馆，登山者只好尽其所能寻找住处——

lines.english: sometimes with the local priest (who was usually as poor as his parishioners),
lines.chinese: 有时是和当地的牧师（他们通常和教区居民一样贫穷），
lines.raw: sometimes with the local priest (who was usually as poor as his parishioners), | 有时是和当地的牧师（他们通常和教区居民一样贫穷），

lines.english: sometimes with shepherds or cheese-makers.
lines.chinese: 有时是和牧羊人或奶酪制造者。
lines.raw: sometimes with shepherds or cheese-makers. | 有时是和牧羊人或奶酪制造者。

lines.english: Invariably the background was the same:dirt and poverty, and very uncomfortable.
lines.chinese: 背景总是相同的：肮脏和贫困，而且非常不舒服。
lines.raw: Invariably the background was the same:dirt and poverty, and very uncomfortable. | 背景总是相同的：肮脏和贫困，而且非常不舒服。

lines.english: For men accustomed to eating seven-course dinners and sleeping between fine linen sheets at home,
lines.chinese: 对于在家中习惯享用七道菜晚餐并睡在精细亚麻床单之间的人来说，
lines.raw: For men accustomed to eating seven-course dinners and sleeping between fine linen sheets at home, | 对于在家中习惯享用七道菜晚餐并睡在精细亚麻床单之间的人来说，

lines.english: the change to the Alps must have been very hard indeed.
lines.chinese: 这种阿尔卑斯山的生活转变一定非常艰难。
lines.raw: the change to the Alps must have been very hard indeed. | 这种阿尔卑斯山的生活转变一定非常艰难。
